summary: Thread context.Context through carried novel/stub command client calls for the 4.27 client API (Get/Put/Post/Delete now take ctx).
reason: The 4.5-era novel commands and deprecated-endpoint stubs predate the context-aware client. RunE closures pass cmd.Context(); plain helpers pass context.Background(), matching the pre-context behavior.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go test ./... pass on the re-printed tree.
